description: A customer wants to book an appointment for a routine oil change and tire rotation.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their vehicle using their phone number or VIN.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the customer and their 2021 Ford F-150.

nodes.task_description: Check the vehicle's service history to confirm recommended services and identify any open recalls.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the vehicle is due for an oil change and finds no open recalls.

nodes.task_description: Offer available appointment slots and book the customer's preferred time, asking if they need a courtesy vehicle.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent books the appointment and notes the customer does not need a courtesy car.
